title: Star (bookmark) sessions and attach local notes
description:
## Summary

Let users **star (bookmark)** sessions and attach a short **private note** to any session. Both persist locally in `~/.cc-lens/` so they survive restarts, and never leave the machine.

## Why

When you have hundreds of sessions, you lose the important ones. A star lets you mark "this is the session where I set up auth" and find it later; a note lets you record why it mattered. This is the natural local-first companion to the existing sessions list, and it stays true to the no-cloud,
